title: 2016 Press Releases

source.name: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System

summary: This source is a listing page that indexes Federal Reserve press releases from 2016, organized chronologically with brief titles and categorical tags (e.g. Monetary Policy, Enforcement Actions, Banking and Consumer Regulatory Policy). It does not contain the actual content of individual releases. The index references FOMC statements from November and December 2016, but the substantive policy content would require accessing each release individually.
key_points: This is a listing/index page, not an individual document—the actual press release content is not present
References several 2016 FOMC statements (November 2, December 14) and economic projections (December 14) which would require separate access
Contains mixed content types: monetary policy, enforcement actions, banking regulation, and administrative announcements
Published date of 2016 makes this a historical record approximately 10 years old
Individual releases would need to be accessed via their specific URLs for substantive research
why_it_matters: This listing page is not directly usable for research as it contains only titles and dates of press releases without content. To extract actual macro catalyst information (FOMC statements, rate decisions, economic data), each individual release would need to be accessed separately. The page serves only as a finding aid.
macro_context: The index references FOMC statements and economic projections from late 2016, but the actual policy content is not present in this listing. Historical FOMC statements from 2016 would be relevant for macro catalyst analysis but must be accessed as separate documents.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page per source_type assessment - violates CORE RULE 6
No substantive policy content present - only titles and categorical tags
Event type set to 'unknown' which is acceptable given listing_page nature, but confirms this is not a valid archivable document
Published date of 2016-12-31 is approximately 9 years and 3 months before TODAY (2026-03-31), making it stale for current analysis

notes: Non-archivable listing page. Per CORE RULE 6, listing_page sources should be marked as non-archiveable. This page provides no extractable policy content—it is merely an organizational index of what press releases exist. To build a useful research archive, individual releases (e.g. FOMC statements from 11/2/2016 and 12/14/2016) should be accessed and processed as separate documents.
